codeReview.summary: The fix addresses both prior blocking regressions. `join_url` now preserves endpoint query strings when constructing localhost/mock request URLs, the loopback transport emits the full origin-form target including `?query`, and `parse_raw_http_response` decodes chunked bodies before both success-path JSON parsing and API-error parsing. The added regression tests cover the two failing cases from the prior review, and I did not find a new blocking regression in the reviewed diff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `sdk-core-worker` still depends on a brainstorming approval loop that workers cannot actually complete in non-interactive mission exec mode, so transport-layer fixes continue to report a procedural deviation even when the worker follows the documented exec-mode fallback.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/sdk-core-worker/SKILL.md:16-24` requires `brainstorming` for transport-layer changes and only then notes the exec-mode fallback; the fix handoff at `handoffs/2026-04-05T16-04-48-777Z__core-foundation-fix-http-loopback-wire-compat__ef3b6e09-6eee-42d4-958e-2350ce114978.json:89-97` still records `followedProcedure=false` for the `Brainstorming approval loop`.

summary: Pass: the fix closes both prior blocking scrutiny findings by preserving localhost query strings end-to-end and decoding chunked localhost responses before parsing, with regression coverage for each path. I found no new blocking issue in the reviewed fix diff; the only follow-on observation is the existing skill-doc mismatch around brainstorming approvals in exec mode.
